doc: DJ-filter + level channel strip (ADR-0057 seed 5): the per-channel output stage -- a bipolar DJ-filter knob (`filter`, -1 lowpass down .. 0 open .. +1 highpass up) and a level knob (`level`, 0..1, rests at 1 = unity), each smoothed against zipper noise, on one audio path. Canonical pipe names per ADR-0058. Wire a channel into `audio`, take the strip's `audio` out to the mix bus; at rest the strip passes audio unchanged.

nodes.doc: Smooths the `filter` pipe (DJ-filter position, [-1..1]) into a zipper-free CV.
The channel's DJ filter; position driven by the smoothed knob.
Smooths the `level` pipe ([0..1]) into a CV.
